intended_use: PeekMed web is a system designed to help healthcare professionals carry out pre-operative planning for several surgical procedures, based on their imported patients' imaging studies. Experience in usa
intended_use_full: PeekMed web is a system designed to help healthcare professionals carry out pre-operative planning for several surgical procedures, based on their imported patients' imaging studies. Experience in usage and a clinical assessment are necessary for the proper use of the system in the revision and approval of the output of the planning. The multi-platform system works with a database of digital representations related to surgical materials supplied by their manufacturers.
target_condition: Orthopedic surgical planning for musculoskeletal injuries and disabilities (hip, knee, upper limb, foot procedures)
ground_truth: Predefined ground truth created by manual annotation; for external validation, labels created by a separate independent team
other_metrics: Segmentation: DICE ≥90%, HD-95 ≤8, STD DICE ±10%, Precision >85%, Recall >90%; Landmarking: MRE ≤7mm, STD MRE ±5mm; Classification: Precision ≥85%, Recall ≥90%, F1 score ≥90%; Detection: MAP ≥90%, Precision ≥85%, Recall ≥90%
